figures.caption: Figure 1: Illustration of Example 1. Panel (a) depicts the principal’s posterior payoff function V (µ). Panels (b), (c), and (d) illustrate the three subproblems, with the blue curve depicting the auxiliary posterior payoff function, the red curve depicting the convex “price function” used to apply the DM Theorem, and the red solid point depicting the posterior mean of a proposal signal.
